instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
This National Technology Day, Buy Life Insurance Online!
Digital innovation is advancing more rapidly than ever before. The adoption of newer technologies has enhanced the operational efficiency and profitability of every business.  Technology has transformed the way how the whole world operates. To remember the technological advancements in India, National Technology Day is celebrated on the 11th of May every year1. In the past few years, technology has been driving changes in all major industries, like healthcare, energy, education, finance, etc. The insurance industry is no exception. All insurance companies have embraced the new tech trends in every aspect of their business operation.
With the growing digital penetration in the Indian insurance sector and the emergence of many insurances, the Indian Insurance market, valued at $131 billion at present, is expected to touch $222 billion by 20262. When it comes to internet users, India is the second highest country in the world, with 658 million internet users3. Hence, digital penetration in the insurance market is expected to rise further, which makes it a more convenient and seamless process for insurance buyers in the country.
On National Technology Day, secure your loved one’s future against uncertainties by availing of life insurance online. Buying a life insurance plan on a digital platform offers a variety of benefits. Let us first look at the benefits of availing of life insurance online.
Advantages of Buying Life Insurance Online
Life insurance is an important and necessary investment for every breadwinner of the family to protect their loved ones against eventualities. Life insurance plans come in various types, right from pure protection plans to goal-specific investment plans such as pension plans. Make use of the digital platform to purchase any of the life insurance plans to enjoy the following benefits:
Convenience
The important feature of online life insurance is that it makes the buying process simple and convenient for you. You can buy life insurance online at any time from anywhere at your convenience without any hassles of paperwork. The process of purchasing life insurance online is extremely simple that needs only a few of your basic information to fill up the form and complete the process by paying online within a few clicks.
Informed investment decision
On the digital platform, the information regarding each life insurance plan is out there for you to access and understand. The digital platform gives you the benefit of comparison shopping. 24 life insurance companies are offering a variety of life insurance plans. You can compare the life insurance plans offered by various life insurance companies on a side-by-side basis on various parameters like policy features, benefits, and cost. As you have all the relevant information regarding life insurance plans that you compare online, you can weigh the plans on various parameters and make a rational and informed choice based on your insurance needs.
Cost-effective
Online life insurance plans are cost-effective compared to the life insurance plans you buy offline for various reasons. When you buy life insurance online, it eliminates the cost of intermediary charges and operational costs. As the entire buying process is done on a digital platform, there is no paperwork involved, which saves you time and reduces the cost. All these cost-reduction benefits are passed on to you through reduced premiums on the life insurance policy. Comparison shopping also helps you get the ideal deal at an affordable price.
Safe and flexible
Digital platforms for buying life insurance plans are tested for the safety of your confidential payment information. This makes the online platform a secure platform for insurance transactions. Along with safety, online life insurance plans are flexible too. You can choose the plan variants as per your need, choose the relevant riders available as per your requirement and select the suitable premium payment frequency (monthly/yearly/quarterly/ half-yearly) at your convenience.
24/7 customer assistance
Buying insurance online provides you with round-the-clock assistance related to your policy. Insurance companies allow you automated servicing for their online products. You get your premium quotes instantly, renew instantly online without paperwork, hassle-free claim process, and can track your life insurance policy.
Conclusion
To sum up, availing an adequate amount of life insurance coverage is an important necessity to shield your family’s financial future. Buying the life insurance policy online reduces your cost, offers you convenience, and gives you the flexibility to customise the coverage as per your insurance needs. Insure early, insure online, and secure your loved ones.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company Ltd., Regd. office Address: Bajaj Allianz House, Airport Road, Yerawada, Pune - 411006, Reg. No.: 116, CIN: U66010PN2001PLC015959, Call us on toll free No.: 1800 209 7272, Mail us: customercare@bajajallianz.co.in, Fax No: 02066026789
Sources
National Technology Day 2022: Date, significance and History - Times of India (indiatimes.com)
Insurance market in India to grow rapidly, reach $222 bn by FY26: Report | Business Standard News (business-standard.com)
India has the second-highest number of internet users in the world. Here are the top 10 for 2022- Technology News, Firstpost
